titleStmt.title: SII 41.264: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 264. (A.R. No. 481 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the south wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: Incomplete. Registers a sale of land by the ūrār of Paḻaiyanūr in Paḻaiyanūr-nāḍu, a dēvadāna of the Tiruvālaṅgāḍu temple in Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu panniraṇṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaviṟ koṭṭattu Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār tevatāṉa
m paḻaiyanūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyanūr Ūrom vilaiyāvaṇak kaiyyeḻuttu Eṅkaḷūr vaṭakaḻaniyiṟ kaṇṭarātittan kaḻaniyil nilam kīḻpāṟkellai ceṟuviṟ kīḻavarampu teṟku nokkik kaṭampa maṭuvile taicca varampukku meṟkum tenpāṟke
llaitirukkāḷattippiccan vāykkāl kaṭampamaṭu pāynta vāykkālukkut ten varampukku vaṭakku melpāṟ kellai munmaṭaikkuṇṭilil melvarampukkuk kiḻakkuk kayaṟ pākkattu maṭappurattiṟ kiḻvarampukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
Digital edition of SII 41.264 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
